title: 20 Minute Dumbbell Leg Workout at Home
description: It is important with Romanian Deadlifts (RDLs) to think about what you are trying to achieve. We are aiming to lengthen the hamstrings. If you are new to this, practice the movement bodyweight only. Tilt forward at the hips whilst keeping a slight bend at the knees.

title: 20min LEGS & GLUTES Lower Body Workout
description:
Follow along and do this effective 20 min lower body workout with just your body weight to train, strengthen and tone your legs (adductors, abductors, quadriceps, hamstrings, calves) and glutes. This leg day workout is mid intensity but includes low impact modifications where necessary.
This resistance based workout uses compound exercises and plyometric movement to give maximum effect for each rep. 
Grab your mat and a towel as we sweat it out and crush this lower body workout in 20 minutes. If you want to burn fat, build muscle, increase strength and overall endurance in your lower body, this is the workout for you.

title: 5 MIN LEAN LEGS WORKOUT (Intense & No Equipment)
description: 5 min lean legs workout! This one is INTENSE! Perfect for some midday movement! NO equipment need, just follow along!

title: 30 Min LEG WORKOUT FROM HELL (Quads, Calves, Hamstrings & Glutes) + Cool Down
description: This 30 minute dumbbell leg workout will have you feeling strong in the moment and barely able to walk the next day. That's what I call a good leg day workout!

title: 5 Minute Dumbbell Leg Workout at Home
description:
Wanting a quick blast to your legs? This 5 minute dumbbell leg workout is for you! 

You could even combine with a body weight leg workout before for a longer workout.

title: 30 MIN LEG WORKOUT - Lower Body, GLUTES and THIGHS - With Weights Home Workout
description: Are you ready to work Team? Here is a spicy HOT 30 MIN GLUTES & THIGHS home workout. These are my favourite exercises to tone and target the GLUTE & THIGH muscles. Add dumbbells for the extra burn.

title: 30 Min DEFINED CALVES & LEG WORKOUT at Home | Bodyweight Only
description:
Aiming for defined looking legs? Wanting to jump higher?  This bodyweight leg workout is 30 minutes combining calf strengthening exercises with quad, glute and hamstring workout to give a great lower body bodyweight workout.

We will be working the calves (triceps surae) in two main positions; bending at knee and straight leg to ensure we work the pair of muscles that make up the calves.

Calves are used in training and daily activities we sometimes don’t notice!  
There are many benefits to having healthy calves and incorporating a calves workout. They help protect the joints, provide stability for the knees, therefore reducing risk of injury and improve your athletic performance with vertical jumping, balancing, sprints and squats to mention afew!

The workout is 30 exercises in total, 45 seconds each and 15 seconds to get ready for next exercise. Simply follow along and have fun!

title: 10 MIN LEG/BOOTY/THIGH WORKOUT (No Equipment Killer Legs)
description: Try this killer at home LEG/BUTT/THIGH workout with NO EQUIPMENT! Get ready to feel the burn.

title: 15 Minutes of Seated Leg Workout - Exercise from the Comfort of Home
description: Coach O, CPT, walks us through a great lower-body workout that you can do at home in a chair! This is great for those who are looking to start firming up those leg muscles. So let’s get started!

title: SLIM LEGS IN 20 DAYS! 10 min No Jumping Quiet Home Workout
description: A workout dedicated to achieving slim looking legs.

title: Get Abs in 2 WEEKS | Abs Workout Challenge
description: Abs Abs Abs! Everyone seems to be asking for a QUICK and short schedule, so I put together a 2 weeks schedule to help you get closer to those defined abs and to lose weight. A 2 weeks program is easier to commit to, and you can always do it again after you finish it!

title: 10 MIN KILLER SIXPACK - super hard ab workout / No Equipment I Pamela Reif
description: a HARDCORE routine, this video is NO JOKE! ♥︎ Do we kill our sixpack or get a killer sixpack with this one? Tell me after those 10min haha!

title: 10 MIN AB WORKOUT // No Equipment.
description: No Equipment necessary, no breaks (you're used to it by now I guess) and not much space needed :) If you need a break tho - take it! Just don't quit!

title: 10 Min Abs Workout to get defined ABS | 3 week weight loss challenge.
description: Get that defined abs! Its a new 10 min ab routine for you, and I think you're going to love this new fun workout! Please leave comments down in the description with your progress and enjoy the new program!

title: 15 MIN LOWER ABS WORKOUT
description: Get ready to feel the burn with this 15 Minute Lower Abs Pilates Workout! You can do this class on it's own or pair it with another workout as an ab finisher.

title: 10 MIN DAILY ABS WORKOUT - At Home Total Core Routine
description: This is a 10 minute COMPLETE core workout that requires NO EQUIPMENT and can be done from home! This is a great daily abs workout that you can include in your routine.

title: 10 MIN EXTREME AB WORKOUT
description: Try this EXTREME ab workout.. 30 sec of workout x 20 different exercises. NO REST.. Remember, every workout get you one step closer to your goals!

title: 7 Minute Daily Home Ab Workout (GET 6 PACK ABS FAST)
description: This 7 minute daily home ab workout is one that you can do without any equipment whether you are a beginner or you are advanced to get abs at home. In this video, I am going to give you a 7 minute ab workout that you can do every day and hits all major functions of the abs. The best part? You can do this ab workout in the comfort of your own home.

title: 10 Minute Dumbbell Chest Workout at Home.
description:
Here’s a chest specific dumbbell chest workout you can do at home. Main movement throughout is the regular chest press followed by variations of chest press and other movements to target the whole chest area. The main reason I like to train chest is that they are large and can lift a lot of weight. Training movements such as bench press all help towards better pushups! As well as helping to stabilise the joints at shoulders, they improve overall posture. Unaware, we use our chest muscles a lot everyday with general lifting etc. And quite simply, benching is fun! 

Each exercise is performed for 30 seconds followed by 30 seconds rest with one round to bring you to the ten minute mark.

title: The ONLY 3 Chest Exercises You Need To Build Muscle (Dumbbells Only!)
description: You don’t need a lot of different exercises and equipment to get a bigger chest. All you need is a set of dumbbells, and these 3 exercises to help you get a bigger chest at home. You are probably used to doing the same chest exercises in your workouts, and it is important to change up that routine to spark new muscle growth. That is why the 3 exercises I am about to give you will help you build a bigger chest and work your chest differently. Let’s get started with the unique 3 exercises you need to build muscle with dumbbells only.

title: 20 MIN CHEST AND SHOULDERS WORKOUT with Dumbbell
description:
Perfect combination… chest and shoulders workout! A solid session targeting the chest with chest press & flyes then onto the delts with pressing, raises and some isolation! 

All you will need for this upper body workout is a pair of dumbbells and your mat! The dumbbells I am using for your reference are 15kg each and 8kg each.

title: Most Effective CHEST Workout at HOME (NO EQUIPMENT NEEDED)
description: Bulk up your chest by working out at home only and WITH NO EQUIPMENT

title: Quick Home Chest Workout for Beginners! (Using Dumbbells)
description: These exercises won’t do anything without proper nutrition and eating at a calorie deficit if trying to lose weight.

title: 10 minute Chest Workout with Dumbbells
description: This at home workout includes a variety of chest building exercises to help tighten and firm! This workout is perfect if you are short on time and still want an awesome workout or you can add this quick strength session after your cardio workout. Also, if you are looking to perk your chest muscles even quicker, include this workout 2-3 times a week in addition to your current routine to activate your chest muscles regularly and build strength!

title: 25-Minute Dumbbell Chest Workout At Home
description: This quick and effective chest workout at home is one of my favorite ways to strength train the upper body. It's also a great workout to add to your routine if you want to improve your push ups and overall upper body strength.

title: 10 MIN ONLY BACK - Body weight Workout, on the floor - maximum focus on back muscles I No Equipment

title: 5 MIN everyday pilates back workout // strong back for good posture.

title: 15 MINUTE BACK WORKOUT FOR STRONGER BACK + BETTER POSTURE | NO EQUIPMENT | BEGINNER + INTERMEDIATE
description: We’ve got a 15 minute back workout to strengthen the back and encourage better posture. If I had to recommend only one exercise that strengthens the muscles around the spine while also improving low back pain, it would be planks and plank variations. They teach you how to brace your core and resist forces that want to extend your spine. So this workout includes more plank variations. Let me know what you think and would love to hear any requests you have for new workouts

title: 10 MINUTE LIGHTWEIGHT DUMBBELL BACK WORKOUT!
description: Grab some Dumbbells between 5-30lbs and try this 10 Minute Lightweight Dumbbell Back Workout. Complete two or three times every week. This is a Back workout you can do anywhere as long as you have access to a pair of lightweight dumbbells. This is great for your Traps and Rear Delts as well.

title: 14 MINUTE BACK WORKOUT FOR STRONGER BACK + BETTER POSTURE | NO EQUIPMENT | BEGINNER + INTERMEDIATE
description: It’s a TOTAL BACK Workout - upper back, lower back, lats, posterior delts, & neck. This video is part of the FALL FIT FULL BODY CHALLENGE (find programs on my instagram: @studio.jibby). To be honest I love to hate back workouts but they are SO necessary for a stronger back + better posture + to relieve back pain when sitting all day long. This 14 minute back werk can be done without equipment and is apartment friendly.

title: 10 MIN BACK FAT WORKOUT | Toned Back Muscles - Get Rid of Back Fat & Bra Bulge.
description: This upper body workout targets your entire back muscles, shoulders & arms. It'll help you to tone your back, lose back fat, get rid of bra bulge and fix your posture. In order to increase the intensity, you can perform all exercises by using weights as well! If you don't have dumbbells at home, feel free to use water bottles instead.

description: Enjoy this beautiful Yoga inspired Stretching Routine to release tension in your upper, middle and lower back. These stretches are designed to help you reduce tension, and gain more relaxation and body awareness. Gift yourself with 10 minutes, just for yourself.

description:
This upper body burner workout will definitely give you a better posture, more upper & lower  back muscles and strength in your whole core.

10 MIN. and I guarantee you , we will sweat.
This burn is just a great workout for an upper body day.

title: 30 MIN PILATES WORKOUT || Upper Body Pilates For Strength & Better Posture (Moderate)
description: This 30 Minute Pilates Workout will help strengthen your upper body and improve your posture. This class will not only strengthen your upper body but also stretch your back to help release any tension. I hope you enjoy it!

title: FULL GYM BACK WORKOUT | a back workout for all fitness levels
description:
Here are the Workout Details!

1. Begin with a Warm-Up

2. Back Workout:
Assisted or Regular Pull-Ups (2x Until Failure)
Banded Pull-Ups (2x Until Failure)
Cable Pulldowns (4x 10-12)
Single Arm Dumbbell Rows (4x10-12/arm)
Rear Delt Flys (4x10-12)
Hyperextensions (4x10-12)

3. Finish with Sprints
15sec Sprint (as fast as you can)
15-20sec Rest/Walk
Repeat Sprint Circuit a total of 5-7x

title: 30 Minute Full Body Dumbbell Workout [Strength Training]
description: Tap in with us for a 30 minute full body dumbbell  workout if you're looking build strength/muscle, endurance, and burn a lot of calories!  All you need is a soft surface and a moderate to heavy pair of dumbbells . This workout is broken down into 2 total sets of 10 exercises with each set containing different variations of the same movement patterns. There are no big modifications for this workout but we recommend reducing the weight or even dropping to bodyweight if necessary. We recommend doing this workout at least 2-3 x per week for if you're looking to build strength/muscle mass and lose body fat. Give this workout a go and be sure to drop a comment to let us know how you did

title: Full Body Workout at Home: Weight Loss & Burn Fat with NO EQUIPMENT
description: Get ready to sweat with the best full body workout at home without equipment. Programmed for weight loss and muscle toning, all without leaving your home! This no-equipment workout targets every muscle group, helping you burn fat and build strength. Perfect for women looking for an effective exercise routine at home, this workout will leave you feeling energized and accomplished. Start your fitness journey today with these simple yet powerful exercises.

title: 30 MIN PUMPING CARDIO WORKOUT | Full Body - No Equipment at Home
description:
Let’s burn some energy with this 30 minute cardio full body workout... no equipment needed. Simply follow along and have fun!

This is meant for low intensity cardio so any jumps, land softly. The pace should be sustainable with heart rate elevated but you aren’t out of breath.... think of a steady, slow paced run!

title: 10 Min HIIT Cardio Workout to Burn Fat
description: This workout is quick, intense and effective without going crazy and doing high impact moves. It is perfect for beginners or those who are new to HIIT workouts.

title: 30 MIN CARDIO WORKOUT AT HOME
description:
GET READY for the HEAT! This workout starts out slow and relaxed but quickly turns into a sweaty, fun mess. You will have one water break halfway through this workout, so make sure to grab your water bottle (hydration is so important and can help you not overeat after this high exertion workout).

Take your time and go at your pace. If you need to pause the workout, it is totally okay! The point is that we keep our bodies moving and keep our heart rate up to get the burn on!
